name: TEST - Invoice Date Out of Range (CIB)
trigger_condition:
PAST_LIMIT_DAYS = 365
FUTURE_LIMIT_DAYS = 180
(
  not is_empty(field.date_issue_manual)
  and (
    field.date_issue_manual <= datetime.date.today() - datetime.timedelta(days=PAST_LIMIT_DAYS)
    or field.date_issue_manual >= datetime.date.today() + datetime.timedelta(days=FUTURE_LIMIT_DAYS)
  )
)

payload.content: Invoice Date cannot be more than one year in the past and three months in the future.
Invoice Date cannot be more than one year in the past and three months in the future.
